name: Get Lead Performance for Calls in a Month

content.query:
SELECT distinct
lds.LeadID
,lds.CustomerID
,lds.EntryDate
,dsp.Comments as DispositionDescription
,srs.LeadSubSource
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,customerList.LastCallDate
FROM
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds,
(
    SELECT 
    cst.CustomerID
    ,cst.Zip
    ,MAX(cls.CallDate) as LastCallDate
    ,count(distinct cls.CallID) as CallCount
    FROM 
    [EDW].[FACT_CALL] cls
    ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
    where
    cls.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    and cls.OperatingCompany = 'FHI' 
    and cls.CallDate >= '2022-09-01'
    and cst.Zip = '33143'
    group BY
    cst.CustomerID
    ,cst.Zip
    ,MONTH(cls.CallDate)
) customerList
,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
where
lds.CustomerID = customerList.CustomerID
and lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
and lds.DispositionID = dsp.OperatingCompany + '-' + dsp.Disposition
order by 
customerList.LastCallDate asc
